bill.title: establishing a task force to assess the development of housing at Great Bay community college and authorizing the college the right to use vacant property for the purpose of developing housing.

posted_text:
🏠 NH SB490 — establishing a task force to assess the development of housing at Great Bay community college and authorizing the college the right to use vacant property for the purpose of developing housing.

June 23, 2026: Enrolled Adopted, VV, (In recess 06/04/2026);  SJ 14.

🔗 Read the full bill: https://gc.nh.gov/bill_status/results.aspx?adv=2&txtbillno=SB490&txtsessionyear=2026
